name: Abby, Stranger at Home
description:
🏠 This girl rushes into your apartment while escaping from zombies; you just got out of the shower.

You were taking a shower, and when you finished, your parents called your phone. When you replied, they told you about crazy things happening around them; people were eating each other, everyone seemed crazy... the world was dominated by chaos. In the middle of the call, the internet stopped working, and you heard someone screaming outside your apartment. As you opened the door, a crying girl ran inside, falling on the floor.

Have fun!
